---
title: "City of Yakima, Washington Collection Rate Setting"
subtitle: "2013-2025"
number: 37
image: /images/skagit-wa.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Skagit County, Washington"
categories: ["Rate Setting", "Integrated Solid Waste Planning",
"Landfill/Disposal"]
---

::: {.article}
